events.title: Composio Saturdays! Let your AI agents orchestrate your many apps in 3 hours!
events.description:
Coffee & Code Philly

events.title: Coffee & Code - Lewisburg meetup
events.description:
Coffee & Code Philly
Grab your laptop and your favorite brew; it's time to code, connect, and caffeinate!

Coffee and Code is a casual, welcoming meetup for developers, designers, students, and tech enthusiasts of all skill levels. Whether you're debugging a side project, learning to code for the first time, job hunting, or just want to work alongside other like-minded people, this is your spot.
No talks, no pressure â just good coffee, good company, and a productive space to get things done. Bring a project you're working on, pair up with someone on a problem, or swap tips and resources with fellow techies in the Lewisburg area.

â All experience levels welcome
ð» Bring your own laptop
ð¤ Great for networking, learning, and accountability
ð Local coffee shop vibes, Lewisburg style

Come for the coffee, stay for the community!

events.title: Coding on Localhost; Connecting the Community
events.description:
Coffee & Code Philly
A fun and light code session where tech friends get together in a Game Lounge, and Code! It's a great opportunity to ask questions, share ongoing projects, help each other out, and meet other awesome coders. We're all about the code, we hope to make a space for people who like to build.

**Notes to keep in mind:**

* BYO Food/Bev is ok, just no alcoholic items.
* The $5.40 tabletop fee will cover use of the Retro Lounge space for 1-4PM and is to be paid individually at the front desk as attendees check-in.
* Power and guest wireless internet access is available, use of extra monitors is possible but not guaranteed. Attendees will ask venue staff for availability/assistance as it's subject to change with weekend events/business volume.

Come out and work, help, or just hang out!

**Links:**
**Site:** codephilly.com
**Donate:** https://hcb.hackclub.com/donations/start/code-and-coffee-philadelphia
**Merch:** https://nol-kky-shop.fourthwall.com/
**LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/company/code-coffee-philadelphia
**Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/philly_codes/
